DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S (A PSEUDONYM) MOTION FOR LEAVE TO COMPEL DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED FROM AUG-16-2013 TO SEP-03-2013 AT 9 AM IN DEPARTMENT 301 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL HAS INDICATED THAT SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES WILL BE SERVED AS TO THE OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THESE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES BE SERVED VIA EMAIL OR FACSIMILE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL NO LATER THAN 5 P.M. ON 8/20/13. NO LATER THAN 8/26/13, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AN AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT INDICATING ANY RESPONSES THAT PLAINTIFF BELIEVES ARE INSUFFICIENT. DEFENDANTS MAY FILE A RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT NO LATER THAN 8/28/13. COURTESY COPIES ARE TO BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE SAME DATE AS FILING. THE COURT WILL RULE ON ANY OUTSTANDING ISSUES AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS ON 9/3/13. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID R. MCDONALD; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Compel Disco
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on TUE-SEP-03-2013:
Margaret M. Lesniak, Esq. of Cesari Werner and Moriarty [415.391.1113] appearing for THE ARCHDIOCESES OF SAN FRANCISCO, ST. ANSELM'S SCHOOL and ODILE STEEL, defendants / opposing parties;
No appearance by or on behalf of the plaintiff / moving party.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff JANE DOE'S (A PSEUDONYM) Motion for Leave to Compel Discovery is denied; request for sanctions denied. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Compel Disco
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Continued To Sep-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff JANE DOE'S (A PSEUDONYM) Motion for Leave to Compel Discovery is continued to 9/3/13 at 9 am in Department 301 on the Court's own motion. Defendants' counsel has indicated that supplemental responses will be served as to the outstanding discovery. The Court orders that these supplemental responses be served via email or facsimile to Plaintiff's counsel no later than 5 p.m. on 8/20/13. No later than 8/26/13, Plaintiff shall file an amended separate statement indicating any responses that Plaintiff believes are insufficient. Defendants may file a response to the amended separate statement no later than 8/28/13. Courtesy copies are to be provided to Department 302 on the same date as filing. The Court will rule on any outstanding issues and Plaintiff's request for sanctions on 9/3/13. Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Compel Disco
